title: InstCombine: Improve single-use fneg(fabs(x)) SimplifyDemandedFPClass handling
author: arsenm
description:
Match the multi-use case's logic for understanding no-nan/no-inf context.
 Also only apply the nsz handling in the single use case. alive2 seems to treat
 nsz as nondeterministic for each use.

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.fabs.f32(float) #0

declare nofpclass(inf zero sub norm) float @nan_only()

define nofpclass(nan) float @fneg_fabs_multiple_uses_fabs(i1 %cond, float %x, ptr %ptr) {
  %nan = call float @nan_only()
  %sel = select i1 %cond, float %x, float %nan
  %fabs = call float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %sel)
  %fneg.fabs = fneg float %fabs
  store float %fabs, ptr %ptr, align 4
  ret float %fneg.fabs
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
